sections.name: Reading Room
sections.description: Quiet study space. Open till 9 PM during exams.

sections.name: Reference Section
sections.description: Reference books, encyclopedias — cannot be issued, in-library use only

sections.name: Digital Corner
sections.description: Computer terminals with internet for digital library access

sections.name: Project Report Section
sections.description: Final year project reports from all departments (2010–2024)

rules: Library card is mandatory for book issue
Mobile phones must be on silent mode
Food and drinks are strictly not allowed
Books must be handled carefully — damage charges apply
Reference books cannot be taken outside
Bags must be deposited at the bag counter
Lost books must be replaced with a new copy or pay double the price
newArrivals: New books are added every semester. Check the Notice Board at library entrance for new arrivals list.
suggestion: Book suggestions can be submitted at the librarian's counter or via library@bitdurg.ac.in
